positive: A stylized, abstract illustration of a cosmic fox spirit, sitting amidst bioluminescent flora and crystalline stardust. The fox has flowing, ethereal tails painted in shades of deep indigo, vibrant cyan, and magenta. Its posture is regal and dynamic. The background features geometric constellations and nebulae patterns, rendered with clean linework and strong contrast. The overall aesthetic is neo-tribal fantasy combined with celestial science. Use bold outlines, flat areas of solid color, and high contrast to ensure crisp print quality. Perfect composition for central apparel placement.
negative: blur, smudge, artifact, text, logo, watermark, grain, low detail, multiple subjects, extra limbs, bad anatomy, signature, copyrighted, poor composition
